title: oreoblastus incanus
intro: Oreoblastus incanus, also known as the 'Mountain Oak Fern', is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreoblastus incanus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Oreoblastus incanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
